title: LLaVA-Grounding: Grounded Visual Chat with Large Multimodal Models

data_creation.process: GPT-4 provided with chat data and ground-truth instances, instructed to match instances with noun phrases
data_creation.advantage: Minimal noise in data annotation pipeline

network_architecture.approach: Connecting output features of Language Model (LLM) with a grounding model

previous_models_limitations: Struggled with fine-grained understanding of images and visual grounding
Treated grounding as a distinct task requiring customized prompts
Text responses changed significantly when tasked with grounding
Could only generate short captions during grounding
Only supported outputting coordinates as text
Lacked pixel-wise grounding and referring capabilities

key_contributions: Data creation: 150K grounded visual chat data points
Network architecture: Connecting output features of LLM with a grounding model

comparisons.LLaVA-G: Achieves a good trade-off between visual grounding and visual chat abilities
comparisons.CogVLM: Has separate models for grounding (CogVLM-Grounding) and chat (CogVLM-Chat)
comparisons.BuboGPT: Maintains chat capability using external grounding model but constrained by language encoder performance
comparisons.Shikra: Engages in referential dialog but has limited performance due to data scarcity
